persona: Customer who first locks a card then checks balance in one call
goal: verify, lock the card, then read the balance

tools.name: verify_identity
tools.description: verify the caller before any sensitive action

tools.name: lock_card
tools.description: lock a card by its last 4 digits after identity is verified

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: return current account balance for an account id

agenda.user: Hi, I need to lock my card and then check my balance.
agenda.note: Neu ham hanh dong nhung chua xac thuc -> chua goi tool

agenda.user: Sure, name David Kim, date of birth December 1st 1978.
Please lock the card ending 3310 first.
Now what is my balance, account AC-9982?
